name: Mahalunge
description: Mahalunge is the premier ultra-luxury residential destination in West Pune, strategically located between Hinjawadi IT Park and Baner. It is home to the massive VTP Bluewaters township.

name: Kharadi
description: Kharadi is East Pune's IT and luxury real estate epicenter. Driven by the EON IT Park and World Trade Center, it offers unparalleled infrastructure and premium high-rise living.

name: Hinjawadi
description: Hinjawadi is the largest IT hub in Pune, employing hundreds of thousands of professionals. It offers immense rental yield potential and rapid capital appreciation due to the upcoming Metro.

name: Baner Sus Road
description: Baner Sus Road perfectly balances the cosmopolitan lifestyle of Baner with the serene, green surroundings of Sus. It's a highly sought-after location for families and professionals.
